rulings.Case Title: IN RE: IN RE OF INGRID WORNIG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing Re: Pettion Of Ingrid Woring To Perpetutate Testimony Of Frank Wornig By Videotaped Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, April 5, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Petitioner Ingrid Wornig¿s petition to perpetuate testimony of Frank Wornig by videotaped oral deposition is granted as to all prospective defendants named in the petition except ConocoPhillips Co., as to whom the petition is denied without prejudice to being refiled with further information. Only ConocoPhillips Co. filed an opposition. The petition fails to explain why Mr. Wornig is now expected to offer testimony against ConocoPhillips Co. when ConocoPhillips Co was not named as a defendant in Mr. Wornig¿s personal injury action. Given the widely-used practice of settling as yet unfiled wrongful death claims as part of the settlement of asbestos personal injury actions, in a typical case there should be no need for a petition such as this one. If there are unusual or different circumstances than the typical case, those circumstances should be explained in the petition. = (220/HEK)
